---
image: img.png
title: Data analytics for behavioral research
author: Damien Dupré
description: Summer School on Behavioral and Neuroscientific Research for Economics,
  Finance and Accounting (ECMCRC 2019)
date: '2019-07-02'
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: jolla
  image-shape: rounded
---

::: {#hero-heading}

Summer School on Behavioral and Neuroscientific Research for Economics, Finance and Accounting (ECMCRC 2019)

:::
